allow: Bash(curl -v -L -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" -H "Referer: https://en.wikipedia.org/" "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/2d/Morgaon.jpg/640px-Morgaon.jpg" -o "D:\\Karve Web Solution\\Holiday Emporium\\Holiday-Emporium\\frontend\\public\\images\\temples\\morgaon.jpg")

PowerShell($headers = @{ "User-Agent" = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36"; "Referer" = "https://en.wikipedia.org/" }; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/2d/Morgaon.jpg/640px-Morgaon.jpg" -Headers $headers -OutFile "D:\\Karve Web Solution\\Holiday Emporium\\Holiday-Emporium\\frontend\\public\\images\\temples\\morgaon.jpg"; $f = Get-Item "D:\\Karve Web Solution\\Holiday Emporium\\Holiday-Emporium\\frontend\\public\\images\\temples\\morgaon.jpg"; Write-Output "Size: $\($f.Length\) bytes")

PowerShell($headers = @{ "User-Agent" = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" }; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/2d/Morgaon.jpg/320px-Morgaon.jpg" -Headers $headers -OutFile "D:\\Karve Web Solution\\Holiday Emporium\\Holiday-Emporium\\frontend\\public\\images\\temples\\morgaon.jpg" -UseBasicParsing; $f = Get-Item "D:\\Karve Web Solution\\Holiday Emporium\\Holiday-Emporium\\frontend\\public\\images\\temples\\morgaon.jpg"; Write-Output "Size: $\($f.Length\) bytes")
